name: SourceMetadata
description: High-level information about the managed rule group that your own rule group is copied from. You can use the the metadata to track version updates made to the originating rule group. You can retrieve all objects for a rule group by calling DescribeRuleGroup.

allOf.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the rule group that your own rule group is copied from.
The update token of the Amazon Web Services managed rule group that your own rule group is copied from. To determine the update token for the managed rule group, call DescribeRuleGroup.
